questionText: The difference in energy between the actual structure and the lowest energy resonance structure for the given compound is
options:
electromeric energy
resonance energy
ionization energy
hyperconjugation energy
subject: Chemistry
solution: The difference in energy between the actual structure and the lowest energy resonance structure for the given compound is known as resonance energy.

questionText: Identify the species having one $$\pi$$-bond and maximum number of canonical forms from the following :
subject: Chemistry
solution: Among SO3, O2, SO2 and CO$$_3^{2 - }$$, only O2 and CO$$_3^{2 - }$$ has only one $$\pi$$-bond.
